article_meta.title: Supreme Court ruling against Trump’s tariffs is unlikely to mean an end to trade policy chaos 1 of 3 | Containers are st

reasoning: Mixed. The model correctly flagged several loaded phrases in the author’s prose, but it violated attribution by flagging a quoted line, missed multiple clear instances in the author’s voice, and used non-standard bias labels.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: It incorrectly flagged the quoted line “The whole thing’s going to be a mess,” which is attributed to Majerus.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Most flagged items are genuine author-level loaded language; only the quoted line is a clear false positive.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed notable author-prose bias such as “Trump’s own unpredictability,” “handy cudgel … smack countries,” “didn’t bother to say,” and the subhead framing (“Confusion surrounds …”).
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Used a non-standard label (“Loaded language / Subjective characterization”) rather than the specified types (e.g., Word Choice, Spin), so labels are systematically incorrect.
